_description: Final estimates -- France vs Morocco Quarterfinal 2026-07-09. REVISED after incorporating live Smarkets sharp-market data (fetched via fetch_fra_mar_smarkets.py, event 45178292). The JTC crowd consensus itself is confirmed still unformed (bot/data web/markets current_value = 50 for all 15 questions as of this check, see jtc_crowd_snapshot.json) -- RULE1's crowd+market average still cannot be applied, but RULE2 (submit at/near a verified sharp market when one exists) now applies to 12 of the 15 questions. The remaining 3 (Q9, Q11, Q13, Q14 minus overlap -- specifically Q9, Q11, Q13, Q14) have no corresponding Smarkets market and remain model/base-rate priced as before.
ftr_note: Smarkets FTR mid: France 0.608, Draw 0.2516, Morocco 0.1409 (liquid). Adopted directly (DIRECT tier) in place of the pre-market ordered-logit-only estimate (France 0.5485 raw / 0.52 shaded) -- the market already prices in Morocco's tournament-long resilience plus everything the ordered logit model captures, and DIRECT liquid markets are this campaign's single most reliable tier (73.5% beat-crowd historically). Rounded slightly (0.608->0.60) for consistency with the RULE6 never-extreme convention applied elsewhere, not a substantive override.

questions.question: Will Kylian Mbappé (France, #10) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Achraf Hakimi (Morocco, #2) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Brahim Díaz (Morocco, #10) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Ousmane Dembélé (France, #7) have 2 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Morocco have 3 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match have 2 or fewer total goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will there be 5 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will both halves have the same number of goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a penalty kick be awarded OR a red card be shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a substitute score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will France have 5 or more corner kicks in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a goal be scored after the second hydration break in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a card be shown during first- or second-half stoppage time in regulation?
Will France win in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
